# Spec: fixture-coverage-mismatch (verify-tools test fixture)

## Purpose

Minimal fixture spec used by verify-tools coverage cross-check tests
(R2.S2 / AC4). `plan.coverage.acs` names AC25, which has no matching
checklist line below — the checklist only ever reaches AC1.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] AC1 → R1.S1 [auto] — sample automatic criterion one.
